title: FRRR - Strengthening Rural Communities: Small & Vital
summary: Community-led regional projects with practical local benefit.
best_for: community gardens; seed swaps; tool libraries; workshops; volunteer coordination; small resilience and food initiatives
who_can_apply: Grassroots community-led projects in remote, rural and regional communities
notes: Strong all-round starter grant for practical regional initiatives.

title: Northern Rivers Community Foundation - Community Grants Program
summary: Region-specific grant program for social and environmental projects.
best_for: community groups across the Northern Rivers working on social disadvantage and environmental sustainability
who_can_apply: Not-for-profit groups and eligible community organisations in the seven Northern Rivers LGAs
notes: High-value grant to track for local inclusion, outreach and resilience projects.

title: Northern Rivers Community Foundation - Recovery and Resilience Grants Program
summary: Disaster recovery and preparedness support for impacted communities.
best_for: flood recovery; disaster resilience; community support; mutual aid; preparedness
who_can_apply: Northern Rivers not-for-profit community groups impacted by disaster
notes: Relevant for groups working post-disruption across the region.

title: Byron Shire Council - Community Initiatives Grant
summary: Small local grant supporting practical community benefit projects.
best_for: local events; outreach; environmental projects; community education; local resilience initiatives
who_can_apply: Incorporated community organisations and groups with auspice arrangements in Byron Shire
notes: Good small local grant for visible local projects.

title: Ballina Shire Council - Community Donations
summary: Small support pathway for community initiatives in Ballina Shire.
best_for: small local community projects; activities; initiatives
who_can_apply: Eligible community organisations in Ballina Shire
notes: Keep details general unless eligibility is freshly verified.

title: Tweed Shire Council - Community Grants Program
summary: Funding for community-led projects that strengthen local connection and care.
best_for: local projects; local activities; outreach; events; capacity-building
who_can_apply: Community groups and not-for-profits in the Tweed region
notes: Useful for community-led activities in Tweed.

title: Kyogle Council - Community Grant Program
summary: Community grant support for projects and events with local benefit.
who_can_apply: Not-for-profit organisations and individuals in the Kyogle LGA
notes: Worth tracking due occasional individual eligibility.

title: Richmond Valley Council - Community Financial Assistance Program
summary: Small grants for grassroots projects and community events.
best_for: small grassroots community projects; events; local initiatives
who_can_apply: Eligible community groups in the Richmond Valley
notes: Recent information suggests two rounds per financial year.

title: Clarence Valley Council - Community Initiatives Program
summary: Broad community support program with multiple assistance types.
best_for: community projects and initiatives benefiting the Clarence Valley
funding: Varies by category; may include cash, rates, or fee waivers
who_can_apply: Not-for-profit organisations and eligible community groups
notes: Useful broad local grant for ongoing and new projects.

title: Clarence Valley Council - Sustainable Agriculture Small Grants
summary: Thematic grant aligned to sustainable agriculture and food systems.
best_for: sustainable agriculture; regenerative growing; land care; practical farming; food systems initiatives
who_can_apply: Eligible groups or applicants in Clarence Valley context
notes: One of the most directly relevant thematic grants.

title: Ballina Shire Council - Resource Recovery Community Grants
summary: Supports circular economy and waste minimisation community projects.
best_for: composting; reuse; repair; waste minimisation; circular economy; resource recovery projects
notes: Good fit for practical local circular systems and education.

title: Lismore Grants Hub
summary: Directory resource to discover current local and regional opportunities.
best_for: finding current local and regional opportunities in one place
notes: Include as grants discovery resource rather than a direct grant.
